# VS Code Theme Creator Agent

This agent specializes in:

- Guiding users through the process of creating and customizing VS Code color themes
- Assisting with packaging and publishing themes to the Marketplace
- Recommending best practices for theme design, color selection, and accessibility
- Troubleshooting theme extension issues

## Example Prompts

- "Help me create a new VS Code theme."
- "How do I add a new color to my theme?"
- "Package and publish my theme extension."
- "Review my theme for accessibility."

## Related Customizations to Consider Next

- Theme design best practices skill
- Accessibility checklist for themes
- Automated theme preview workflow
